objective: Implement guarded qualification-aware routing for one explicitly approved Track. Enforcement must remain disabled by default for every Track except the single pilot Track explicitly configured during validation.

pilot.reason: No companion track has a current, valid 'qualified' model capability with sufficient shadow routing evidence. All model qualification records for companion tracks have status 'candidate' or 'screening', resolving to 'untested'. The only 'qualified' model capability targets the Benchmark Lab 'hybrid-weather' track, not a companion runtime track. Enforcement machinery implemented and ready for pilot activation when conditions are met.
requiredForActivation: Companion track with model role having 'qualified' or 'conditional' qualification record (non-candidate/non-screening status)
At least 3-5 shadow routing comparisons showing consistent recommendation agreement
Qualification record must be current (not expired or stale)
Runtime availability and model readiness verifiable

results: 83/83 enforcement routing tests pass (5 policy states, 10 eligibility failures, 7 routing evidence, 5 runtime failures, 3 enforcement metrics, 2 builder, 2 shadow compatibility, 1 non-pilot compatibility)
18/18 crew track run record tests pass
Zero companion imports from benchmark-lab/engine/ — architectural boundary preserved
All tracks remain in shadow state by default
No pilot track activated — enforcement inactive for all tracks

passed: Enforcement evaluation integrated into canonical model router (companion/crew/model-router.js) via evaluateEnforcement()
Routing sequence: current selection → shadow recommendation → policy evaluation → final selection → execution
Enforcement decision recorded in Track Run Records via optional routing.enforcementDecision
Fallback behavior: enforced capability failure triggers re-execution with original selected model
Fallback decision, original error, and success/failure recorded in enforcement decision
Evidence review extended with buildEnforcementMetrics() — enforcement attempts, applied, blocked, fallback, success rates per capability, qualification record usage, failed conditions
Safe state change enforcement: POST /enforcement/set to enforced requires track approval, qualified capability, and non-suspended state
All tracks remain in shadow — no enforcement enabled
83 tests in scripts/test-enforcement-routing.js cover all required scenarios
Historical records and checksums remain valid
